title: DPI problem with > 32 bit but <= 64 bit args

features.name: dpi_c_task_export_with_33_to_64_bit_vector_arg
features.description: Code should include an export "DPI-C" task declaration with an input argument of type bit [WIDTH-1:0] where 33 <= WIDTH <= 64

features.name: dpi_arg_bit_vector_width_33_to_64
features.description: Code should include a task or function argument declared as bit vector with width between 33 and 64 bits
